description: 企业内部绩效管理平台 - H5 网页站点，包含用户管理、OKR 管理、绩效评分、团队管理、AI 助手等模块

userStories.title: 数据库 Schema 设计 - 用户与关系表
userStories.description: As a developer, I need database tables for users and hierarchical relationships to support the multi-level, many-to-many reporting structure.
acceptanceCriteria: Create t_user table: id, username, password, name, gender, age, phone, department, status
Create t_user_relation table: id, superior_id, subordinate_id (supports multi-level many-to-many hierarchy)
Insert admin user: username='gongyuwen', password='gongyuwen' with full data and feature permissions
Create enum or lookup tables for user status and roles
Compilation passes

userStories.title: 数据库 Schema 设计 - OKR 与评分表
userStories.description: As a developer, I need database tables for OKR records and performance scoring to store the full OKR lifecycle.
acceptanceCriteria: Create t_okr table: id, user_id, title, content, status (正常/审核中/驳回待修改/作废), created_at, updated_at
Create t_okr_review table: id, okr_id, reviewer_id, review_type (self/leader/final), score, details (JSON), completed_at
Create t_score_rule table: id, dimension_name, weight, description, cycle_type (employee/leader)
Create t_score_record table: id, okr_id, reviewer_id, total_score, dimension_scores (JSON), locked (boolean)
Compilation passes

userStories.title: 数据库 Schema 设计 - 消息与系统配置表
userStories.description: As a developer, I need tables for in-app messages, notification settings, and assistant question bank.
acceptanceCriteria: Create t_message table: id, user_id, title, content, type, is_read, created_at
Create t_notification_config table: id, config_key, enabled, target_user_groups (JSON)
Create t_assistant_qa table: id, question, answer, assistant_type (根宝/多多/蛋挞), tags
Create t_book table: id, title, summary, chapters (JSON), interpreted_at
Compilation passes

userStories.title: 用户认证 - 登录页与 Session 管理
userStories.description: As a user, I want to log in with my username and password so that I can access the platform with my role-based permissions.
acceptanceCriteria: Login page with username and password fields
Admin user 'gongyuwen' logs in and gets all permissions
Regular user logs in and gets role-based permissions (领导/员工)
Session or JWT token management with expiration
Redirect to homepage after successful login
Compilation passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: 账号管理 - 管理员 CRUD
userStories.description: As an admin, I want to create, view, edit, and delete user accounts so that I can manage the team.
acceptanceCriteria: Admin-only account list page with all user fields displayed
Create user form: name, gender, age, phone, department, password
Edit user form with all fields updatable
Delete user with confirmation dialog
Search/filter by name, department, phone
Compilation passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: 团队管理 - 组织架构画布
userStories.description: As an admin, I want a canvas view to draw department columns and connect reporting lines with arrows so that I can visualize the team hierarchy.
acceptanceCriteria: Admin-only team management page with department column layout
Visual canvas with drag-and-drop or click-to-connect interaction
Single-direction arrows showing reporting lines (arrow points to superior)
Ability to add/remove departments and users on canvas
Save hierarchy changes to database
Compilation passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: 我的 OKR - 列表与状态展示
userStories.description: As a user, I want to see my own OKR list with status indicators so that I can track my OKR lifecycle.
acceptanceCriteria: OKR list page showing user's own OKRs only
Status badges: 正常, 审核中, 驳回待修改, 作废
Status=正常: show 新增 and 编辑 buttons
Status=审核中: no action buttons shown
Status=驳回待修改: show 编辑 button
Status=作废: show 新增 button
Compilation passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: 我的 OKR - 新增与编辑
userStories.description: As a user, I want to create and edit OKRs via manual input or image upload so that I can record my objectives.
acceptanceCriteria: Manual OKR creation form with objective and key results fields
Image upload for OKR (with OCR recognition to extract text)
After creation, OKR status becomes 审核中 and 新增 button disabled
Edit OKR form pre-filled with existing data
After editing, OKR status becomes 审核中 and edit disabled until reviewed
Compilation passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: 我的 OKR - 审核提交流程
userStories.description: As a user, I want to submit my OKR for review so that my manager can approve or reject it.
acceptanceCriteria: Single manager: OKR submitted, manager receives review task
Multiple managers: parallel approval, any rejection sets status to 驳回待修改
No manager: routes to admin for review
Manager can approve (status=正常) or reject (status=驳回待修改 with reason)
Admin can approve, reject, or void (status=作废)
In-app message notification sent on status change
Compilation passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: 绩效评分 - 自评
userStories.description: As a user, I want to self-evaluate my OKR so that I can provide my own performance assessment.
acceptanceCriteria: Self-evaluation form accessible from 正常 status OKR
Form displays scoring dimensions from t_score_rule with weights
Total score auto-calculated: sum of (dimension_score × weight)
After submission, score is locked and cannot be modified
If no manager: proceed directly to final scoring
If has manager: trigger leader scoring task
Compilation passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: 绩效评分 - 领导评分
userStories.description: As a manager, I want to score my subordinate's OKR so that I can provide performance evaluation.
acceptanceCriteria: Leader scoring form visible after subordinate completes self-evaluation
Same scoring dimensions as self-evaluation form
Total score auto-calculated with weights
After submission, score locked and triggers admin final scoring task
Leader can view self-evaluation and leader scores after completion
Compilation passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: 绩效评分 - 管理员录入最终评分
userStories.description: As an admin, I want to enter the final performance score so that the OKR evaluation cycle is complete.
acceptanceCriteria: Final scoring form accessible after leader scoring is complete (or self-eval if no leader)
Admin can input or adjust final score
After submission, all three scores (self, leader, final) are visible to all parties
All scores locked after final submission
Compilation passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: 团队 OKR - 管理员视图
userStories.description: As an admin, I want to see all team members' OKRs grouped by manager so that I can oversee the entire organization.
acceptanceCriteria: Admin-only page with OKRs grouped by manager/department
Displays all users' OKRs across the organization
Can approve, reject, or void OKRs in 审核中 status
Can enter leader scoring or final scoring based on current stage
Filter by status, department, user
Compilation passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: 团队 OKR - 领导视图
userStories.description: As a manager, I want to see my direct subordinates' OKRs so that I can review and score them.
acceptanceCriteria: Manager-only page showing only direct subordinates' OKRs
Can approve, reject, or void OKRs in 审核中 status
Can enter leader scoring after subordinate self-evaluation
Can enter final scoring if applicable
Filter by status and subordinate
Compilation passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: 首页 - 仪表盘布局
userStories.description: As a user, I want a homepage dashboard with AI assistant, bookshelf, calendar, task todos, and recent visits so that I can quickly access key features.
acceptanceCriteria: Homepage displays after login with all sections visible
AI assistant section with avatar image and searchable question input
Bookshelf section showing previously interpreted books
Calendar section with highlighted dates for active workflows
Todo section with two tabs: 当前待办 and 历史流程
Recent visits section showing last 5 accessed features
Compilation passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: AI 助手 - 形象切换与问答
userStories.description: As a user, I want to interact with AI assistants (根宝, 多多, 蛋挞) so that I can get answers to common questions.
acceptanceCriteria: Three assistant avatars displayed: 根宝(银渐层), 多多(布偶), 蛋挞(金渐层)
Click to switch between assistant characters
Care message displayed every 1 minute
Search box matches questions from t_assistant_qa question bank
Admin-configurable question bank via system settings
Compilation passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: 书架 - 书籍解读
userStories.description: As a user, I want to view interpreted books with chapter summaries and add new books for daily interpretation.
acceptanceCriteria: Bookshelf displays previously interpreted books
Admin can add one new book per day by entering full title
Book interpretation includes chapter-by-chapter summary and reading notes
Online search integration for book information lookup
Book detail page shows full interpretation content
Compilation passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: 系统设置 - 评分规则配置
userStories.description: As an admin, I want to configure scoring rules so that I can adjust evaluation dimensions, weights, and cycles.
acceptanceCriteria: Admin-only settings page for scoring rules
Can configure employee and leader evaluation cycles separately
Can add/edit/delete scoring dimensions with weights and descriptions
Weight validation: total must equal 100%
Changes apply to new evaluations, existing locked evaluations unaffected
Compilation passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: 系统设置 - 消息提醒配置
userStories.description: As an admin, I want to configure notification toggles so that users receive timely reminders for OKR and scoring workflows.
acceptanceCriteria: Admin-only notification settings page
Toggle for OKR process reminders (by user group)
Toggle for scoring process reminders (by user group)
Toggle for OKR submission reminders (by user group)
Toggle for self-evaluation reminders (by user group)
Settings persisted and applied in notification sending logic
Compilation passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: 图片上传与 OKR 识别
userStories.description: As a user, I want to upload images and have OKR content automatically extracted via OCR so that I can digitize paper OKRs.
acceptanceCriteria: Image upload component with drag-and-drop and file picker
OCR processing to extract text from uploaded images
Extracted text auto-populates OKR form fields
User can review and edit OCR results before saving
Support common image formats: JPG, PNG
Compilation passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill
